title: Fine victory for Badgers academy
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers Academy last week defeated by 239 runs the Fort Hare Academy in a three-day game at NMU's Saasveld Campus in George.


> The Badgers, who batted first, posted 441 all-out, reaching the mammoth total thanks to centuries by Kyle Jacobs (158) and Heath Richards (102).


Fort Hare was dismissed for 232 runs in their first innings with Tyrece Karelse (3/20) and Enathi Kitshini (3/37) the pick of the Badgers bowlers.

The Badgers declared in their second innings on 167/4 with Richards (55*) and Jacobs (43) again the top scorers. Stefan May also scored 42 for the men from the Garden Route.

Having set Fort Hare a target of 377, Arend Visser excelled with 7/25 while Liviwe Bawuli (2/8) provided valuable support as the Badgers won by 239 runs.


> This victory was valuable preparation for the Badgers Colts team who will take on Boland in a Three- and One-Day match in Paarl this weekend.


The Badgers Colts squad for the weekend is: Matthew Christensen, Mark Andrianatos, Stefan May, Hayden Sweet (captain), Heath Richards, Liyabona Malife, Joof Enslin, Arend Visser, Grant Esau, Mesuli Vuba, Enathi Khitshini, Thurstin Murphy and Jarred Jardine.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
